title: Carlton Kitchen Renovation & Remodel
summary: Kitchen renovation in Carlton using a darker lower-cabinet palette, lighter uppers and stone-led detailing.
heroAlt: Carlton kitchen remodel with two-tone cabinetry and stone splashback
overview: Carlton is one of the clearer before-and-after kitchen stories in the imported set because the finish shift is immediate. The remodel relies on the contrast between the darker base cabinetry, lighter overheads and full-height splashback to make the room feel cleaner and more deliberate.
materials: Kitchen remodel with clearer working layout

afterImages.alt: Carlton kitchen renovation with two-tone cabinetry
afterImages.caption: Completed Carlton kitchen remodel with darker lower cabinetry, lighter uppers and a full-height stone-look splashback.

afterImages.alt: Carlton kitchen cabinet and splashback detail
afterImages.caption: Closer kitchen detail from Carlton showing the cabinetry finish and splashback treatment.

beforeImages.caption: Original Carlton kitchen before the cabinetry, benchtop and splashback update.

spaces.title: Kitchen
spaces.text: A kitchen remodel that lifted both the finish quality and the way the room works through cleaner cabinetry, stronger contrast and a more settled layout.

outcome: The renovation gives the kitchen a stronger visual hierarchy and a more considered working layout, rather than just swapping cabinet fronts for something newer.
ctaText: If you are planning a kitchen renovation in Carlton or St George, send through your current photos and we can help with the next step.
